backAlleyTalesGameplayGuide.title: Back Alley Tales Gameplay Guide
backAlleyTalesGameplayGuide.intro: This guide introduces the core gameplay framework of Back Alley Tales, including exploration, interactions, dialogue choices, and progression systems. It helps new players understand how to navigate the mysterious urban environment and advance through the narrative experience.

steps.title: Basic Controls
steps.description: Learn the fundamental movement, interaction, and navigation controls used to explore the urban environments of Back Alley Tales.

steps.title: Exploration Mechanics
steps.description: Understand how to investigate streets, alleys, and environmental details to uncover story elements scattered across the city.

steps.title: Dialogue System
steps.description: Discover how conversations, player choices, and interactions with characters shape the direction of the narrative.

steps.title: Story Progression
steps.description: See how advancing through events unlocks new areas and reveals hidden layers of the overarching storyline.

steps.title: Interaction System
steps.description: Master object interactions and investigation methods that help resolve situations encountered during exploration.

steps.title: Save System
steps.description: Learn how saving works and how to manage different story paths when exploring branching narrative routes.

quickTips: Talk to every character you meet, since dialogue choices can open new story branches.
Revisit locations after major story events, because new interactions often appear.
Keep multiple save slots so you can explore different decisions without losing progress.
Read environmental details carefully, since clues often guide the next objective.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Back Alley Tales

questions.question: What kind of game is Back Alley Tales?
questions.answer: Back Alley Tales is a dark narrative adventure game focused on exploration, character interactions, dialogue choices, and a branching story set in a mysterious urban world.

questions.question: Is Back Alley Tales a singleplayer game?
questions.answer: Yes. Back Alley Tales is a singleplayer narrative experience centered on story, exploration, and character-driven progression.

questions.question: Does Back Alley Tales have multiple endings?
questions.answer: Back Alley Tales features branching narrative paths where dialogue choices and actions influence the story direction and the endings players can reach.

questions.question: What platforms is Back Alley Tales available on?
questions.answer: Back Alley Tales is available on PC and mobile platforms. Check the system requirements section for detailed compatibility information.

questions.question: How long does it take to finish Back Alley Tales?
questions.answer: A typical playthrough of Back Alley Tales depends on exploration style and how much optional content you pursue, with branching routes adding replay value.

questions.question: Where can I find the latest Back Alley Tales guides?
questions.answer: This Back Alley Tales Wiki is updated regularly with gameplay guides, walkthroughs, character info, ending routes, and the latest news.
